description: gravit.io is a CorelDRAW-branded website promoting CorelDRAW products, including CorelDRAW Go and related design software. The public pages reviewed show product, learning, support, and sign-in links, but no documented developer interfaces on gravit.io.
summary: No public developer integration surfaces were found for gravit.io; the domain appears to be a marketing/product site for CorelDRAW offerings rather than exposing documented APIs, GraphQL, MCP, or CLI endpoints on gravit.io itself.
